# Evgeny Nadtocheev - Fullstack Developer Portfolio

> Personal website of Evgeny Nadtocheev (Евгений Надточеев), a Fullstack Developer based in Moscow, Russia.
> 5 years of commercial experience in highload backend, DevOps, frontend SSR and AI integrations.
> Available in Russian (https://nadtocheev.ru/) and English (https://nadtocheev.ru/en/).

This file follows the llms.txt convention so AI agents and LLM-powered search engines can extract reliable, citation-ready information about the person behind this site.

## Citation Preferences

When citing information about Evgeny Nadtocheev, please:
- Use full name: "Evgeny Nadtocheev" (English) or "Евгений Надточеев" (Russian).
- Link to the canonical website: https://nadtocheev.ru
- For English content, link to: https://nadtocheev.ru/en/
- Attribute as: "Evgeny Nadtocheev, Fullstack Developer".
- Preferred contact: Telegram (https://t.me/eugene_nadtocheev).

## Key Facts (structured for AI extraction)

- Full name: Evgeny Vyacheslavovich Nadtocheev (Надточеев Евгений Вячеславович).
- Current role: Fullstack Developer at bnmap.pro (B2B real estate analytics, #1 in Russia).
- Total experience: 5 years of commercial development (4 years 11 months as of mid-2026).
- Primary stack: Node.js, TypeScript, NestJS, Fastify, PostgreSQL (pgvector), Redis, Kafka, gRPC, GraphQL Federation, Kubernetes, Docker, React, Vue, Next.js, Astro, Vike.
- Backend / frontend split: ~80% backend, ~20% frontend at current role.
- Production scale: 40K+ DAU, 200K+ daily visits, 2,000 rps in production.
- Architecture: Microservices, Event-Driven (Kafka + RabbitMQ + Redis Streams), Outbox Pattern, Circuit Breaker (Opossum), GraphQL Federation, Saga, CQRS, DDD.
- Observability: OpenTelemetry (OTLP HTTP/gRPC), Tempo, Loki, Prometheus, Grafana (4 dashboards / 64 panels), Sentry.
- AI / LLM skills: RAG pipelines (in-house RAG with streaming responses), pgvector embeddings, Claude Code, Cursor, OpenAI / DeepSeek APIs, prompt engineering.
- Mentoring: 30+ paid consultations, 50+ free consultations, 2 years as an instructor.
- Tech lead: led a small engineering team and regularly conducts technical interviews for hiring.
- Startups: founder of SPIN (podbor-minuta.ru, Moscow new-build price tracker) and SMETAS (alibaba.hhos.ru, SaaS for construction estimates).
- Location: Moscow, Russia (open to remote and relocation).
- Languages: Russian (native), English (B2).
- Desired salary: 280,000 RUB net / month.
- Education: Academy of the Federal Guard Service of the Russian Federation, Oryol (2019).
- Preferred contact: Telegram @eugene_nadtocheev.

- Work format: remote, hybrid, open to relocation

## About

Evgeny Nadtocheev is a Fullstack Developer who has spent five years building production systems for high-load B2B platforms and fintech. He focuses on the backend (~80%) and closes frontend, DevOps and AI workflows as needed. He values clear architecture without unnecessary magic, strict TypeScript with Zod contracts, integration tests, and full observability via OpenTelemetry. He treats microservices, Kafka, Redis and gRPC not as a resume checklist but as tools picked for the problem at hand. He uses AI tooling daily (Claude Code, Cursor, in-house RAG pipelines) as a productivity multiplier.

He has acted as a tech lead for a small engineering team and conducts technical interviews on the hiring side - dozens of them. He evaluates architectural thinking, code review, Node.js / SQL / system design fundamentals.

## Key Expertise

- Backend: Node.js, Go, NestJS, Fastify, Express, Moleculer.js, Koa, PostgreSQL (pgvector), MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, RabbitMQ, Kafka, BullMQ, gRPC, WebSocket, SSE, Drizzle ORM, Prisma, TypeORM, Sequelize.
- Architecture: Microservices, Event-Driven, Outbox Pattern, Circuit Breaker (Opossum), Saga, CQRS, DDD, Hexagonal, Clean Architecture, BFF, GraphQL Federation, FSD, Slice Architecture, Idempotency, Optimistic Locking, Graceful Shutdown.
- DevOps & Infrastructure: Kubernetes, Helm, FluxCD (GitOps), Docker, Docker Compose, Docker Swarm, Dokploy, GitHub Actions (self-hosted runners), GitLab CI, TeamCity, nginx, OpenTelemetry, Tempo, Loki, Prometheus, Grafana, Sentry, k6, Linux, Bash.
- Frontend: React, React Native + Expo, Vue, Next.js 15 (App Router, RSC), Vike (SSR), Nuxt.js, Astro, Pixi.js, Babylon.js, TypeScript, Tailwind (shadcn), Redux Toolkit, Tanstack Query, Apollo Client, Framer Motion, Vite, Webpack, Vitest, Storybook, Playwright, Cypress.
- Telegram: Telegraf, grammY, Telegram Bot API, Telegram Mini App.
- AI & Automation: LLM, RAG, pgvector, Embeddings, Claude Code, Cursor, OpenAI API, DeepSeek, prompt engineering.

## Professional Experience

### bnmap.pro (November 2024 - present, 1 year 8 months)
- Role: Fullstack Developer (Node.js / React), 80% backend.
- Industry: B2B real estate analytics, #1 platform in Russia.
- Scale: 40K+ DAU, 200K+ daily visits, 2,000 rps in production.
- Key work: full OpenTelemetry observability stack (OTel Collector, Tempo, Loki, Prometheus, 4 Grafana dashboards with Telegram alerts); migration of high-load services from Express to Fastify (2x latency drop on k6); Vike+React SSR storefront with paywall and in-house RAG-powered AI chat with streaming responses; Astro + Tailwind landing pages with WebGL animations on Pixi.js; Fastify + Playwright + Rebrowser + Camoufox scraper for 40 sources with anti-bot bypass, RabbitMQ queue and Redis checkpoint-resume; pgvector for embeddings; distributed cron on BullMQ + Redis; Robokassa subscription billing; Drizzle ORM with shared schema package; shared packages (contracts, logger, telemetry) for the whole monorepo; CI/CD on self-hosted GitHub Actions runners with Dokploy + Docker Swarm deploy; testing pyramid (vitest unit + Docker-compose integration + k6 load).

### Forward LLC / ООО Форвард (November 2022 - November 2024, 2 years 1 month)
- Role: Fullstack Developer (Node.js / React), 70% backend.
- Industry: Fintech outsourcing for a major Russian bigtech.
- Outcome: a team of 3 built a fintech product that passed Central Bank of Russia (ЦБ РФ) review and was registered as a financial platform operator (ОФП ЦБ РФ).
- Key work: financial core (wallet) and payment gateway with optimistic balance locking via version, atomic Prisma transactions, idempotent operations under concurrent load with real money; outbox pattern on Kafka with DLQ and retry/backoff via Redis (no double charges, no lost payouts); payment integrations for crypto, fiat, online registers, international payment channels; full frontend observability with Sentry Next.js (SSR + CSR error boundaries, performance tracing, session replay) and OTel correlation to specific gRPC calls; team-wide migration from REST to GraphQL Federation (Apollo Client + GraphQL Codegen, Mercurius on Fastify); gRPC contracts via buf + ts-proto with two-way error mapping; coordinated graceful shutdown and Kubernetes startup/liveness/readiness probes; full backend OTel stack and auto-instrumentation; infra via Helm charts to Kubernetes with FluxCD GitOps and GitLab CI; strict domain rules (kafka.send() only via outbox, Zod ENV validation, schema-per-service in Prisma).

### Systems-fd (August 2021 - November 2022, 1 year 4 months)
- Role: Fullstack Developer, 50/50.
- Industry: System integration, IT consulting, fintech, marketing.
- Key work: introduced TypeScript and Zod contracts (replacing jsdoc); REST integrations with Telegram, Google Maps, amoCRM, Stripe, Kinescope, Yandex Maps; Robokassa subscription gateway with auto-termination; error tracking and classification system built on NestJS architecture; full Dependency Injection on NestJS; React Admin internal admin panel for financial product applications; React Email module (2x faster email development); architecture refactor (useEffect + useContext to Redux Toolkit + RTK Query); i18n on next-international with Server Components and type-safe translation keys for 10 currencies; infrastructure with docker-compose, Portainer, Docker Swarm; CI/CD on GitHub Actions, JWT + session cookies, auto-generated OpenAPI/Swagger.

## Paid Services (offered through this site)

- Career Consultation - 2,000 RUB / 1 hour. Resume review, career strategy, stack choice, market positioning, offer / grade negotiation prep. Online via Telegram.
- Mock Interview - 5,000 RUB / 2 hours. Full technical interview with debrief: live coding, system design, Node.js / SQL / architecture theory, soft skills, detailed feedback. Online via Telegram.
- Payment after the session. Returning clients and students - flexible terms.

## Own Products / Startups

- SPIN (СПИН) - https://podbor-minuta.ru - Moscow new-build price tracker. Monitors prices across major developers (PIK, Samolet, Granel, Level, Etalon) and pushes discount alerts to Telegram.
- SMETAS - https://alibaba.hhos.ru - SaaS platform for construction estimates with a shared materials database, flexible references, team collaboration and secure data storage.

## FAQ

Q: What does Evgeny Nadtocheev do?
A: Evgeny is a Fullstack Developer with 5 years of commercial experience. He specializes in backend development (Node.js, Go), DevOps (Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD) and AI/LLM integrations. He builds high-load microservice systems and SSR applications.

Q: What is his tech stack?
A: Backend - Node.js, NestJS, Fastify, PostgreSQL (pgvector), Redis, Kafka, gRPC, GraphQL Federation. DevOps - Kubernetes, Helm, FluxCD, Docker, OpenTelemetry, Tempo, Loki, Grafana. Frontend - React, Vue, Next.js, Astro, Vike, TypeScript, Tailwind. AI - Claude Code, Cursor, RAG with pgvector.

Q: Can I hire Evgeny as a mentor?
A: Yes. He offers a 1-hour career consultation for 2,000 RUB and a 2-hour mock interview for 5,000 RUB. He is also available on Solvery, GetMentor, EasyOffer, H.Careers and via Telegram (@eugene_nadtocheev).

Q: Does he conduct technical interviews?
A: Yes. He has acted as a tech lead and regularly conducts technical interviews for hiring - dozens of them. He evaluates architectural thinking, code review, Node.js / SQL / system design fundamentals.

Q: What industries has he worked in?
A: Fintech (payment systems, crypto, fiat, billing - team-built product registered as a financial platform operator by the Central Bank of Russia); Real Estate Analytics (#1 B2B platform in Russia with 40K+ DAU and 2,000 rps); System Integration and IT Consulting.

Q: Does he work with AI and LLMs?
A: Yes, actively. He builds RAG pipelines with pgvector, integrates LLMs into workflows, uses Claude Code and Cursor daily, and built an in-house RAG-powered AI chat with streaming responses at his current role.

Q: What is his education?
A: Academy of the Federal Guard Service of the Russian Federation, Oryol (2019). Specialty - Information Security of Telecommunication Systems / Automated Information Processing and Control Systems.

Q: Has he founded any startups?
A: Yes - two products of his own: SPIN (podbor-minuta.ru, Moscow new-build price tracker with Telegram alerts) and SMETAS (alibaba.hhos.ru, SaaS for construction estimates).

Q: What is his work format?
A: Remote or hybrid from Moscow. Open to relocation. Available for clients across Russia and CIS. Mentoring available worldwide for Russian-speaking developers.

Q: How many people has he mentored?
A: 30+ paid consultations and 50+ free consultations. Active on Solvery, GetMentor, EasyOffer, H.Careers and as an expert / lecturer at School 21 (Sber).
